_meta.description: Luxury niche design systems for the Autonomous Web Designer Engine. Each niche defines a self-contained brand bible: palette, typography, copy patterns, trust signals, monetization tiers and positioning. Consumed by both extract_brand.py (Python) and generate.js / analyze_competitors.js (Node).

medical.label: Medical & Dental
medical.voice_tone: Calm, authoritative, reassuring. Communicates clinical excellence and human warmth.

hero.headline: {NAME}
hero.subheadline: Concierge-level care, engineered around your time. Modern clinical excellence with the warmth your patients remember.

services.title: Comprehensive Care
services.desc: End-to-end treatment plans built around the whole patient, not just the symptom.

services.title: Same-Week Appointments
services.desc: Streamlined scheduling and digital intake so you are seen when it matters.

services.title: Advanced Diagnostics
services.desc: Modern imaging and lab partners deliver answers faster and with more precision.

services.title: Transparent Billing
services.desc: Clear estimates and insurance coordination before any treatment begins.

value_propositions: HIPAA-conscious digital intake that cuts patient wait time in half.
Trust-first design proven to lift new-patient conversion for clinics.
Sub-second load times that keep anxious patients from bouncing.
medical.ownable_angle: The only practice in the area that feels like concierge medicine before you even walk in.

deliverables: Bespoke premium clinical brand & landing system
Monthly accessibility & Core Web Vitals tuning

legal.label: Law Firms
legal.voice_tone: Composed, authoritative, discreet. Projects gravitas, precision and trust.

hero.headline: {NAME}
hero.subheadline: Decisive representation for high-stakes matters. Discreet, relentless, and respected across the table.

services.title: Litigation & Trial
services.desc: Courtroom-tested advocacy for the matters that cannot afford to be lost.

services.title: Counsel & Strategy
services.desc: Proactive guidance that prevents disputes before they ever reach a filing.

services.title: Confidential Handling
services.desc: Discreet, conflict-checked representation that protects your reputation.

services.title: Transparent Engagement
services.desc: Clear scopes and fee structures agreed before any work begins.

value_propositions: Authority-first design that signals gravitas within the first 50ms.
Case-results architecture engineered to convert high-value inquiries.
Secure, conflict-aware intake built for confidential matters.
legal.ownable_angle: The firm that looks as formidable online as it is in the courtroom.

home-services.label: Home Services & Custom Builders
home-services.voice_tone: Confident, grounded, premium. Communicates craftsmanship and reliability.

hero.headline: {NAME}
hero.subheadline: Craftsmanship you can stand inside. Award-grade builds and remodels delivered on time, on budget, without the chaos.

services.title: Custom Builds
services.desc: Ground-up homes and additions engineered to your life and your lot.

services.title: Premium Remodels
services.desc: Kitchens, baths and whole-home transformations with zero surprise costs.

services.title: Project Transparency
services.desc: Live schedules, milestone updates and a single point of contact throughout.

services.title: Warrantied Quality
services.desc: Licensed crews and a written workmanship warranty on every project.

value_propositions: Portfolio-first design that turns finished projects into booked estimates.
Trust-signal architecture (licensing, warranty, reviews) front and center.
Fast, mobile-first experience built for homeowners researching on the go.
home-services.ownable_angle: The builder whose website is as polished as their finished work.
